ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart entry */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Standard size label (e.g., XXS, XS, S, M) */,
  "bust_cm" REAL /* Bust measurement in centimeters */,
  "bust_inches" REAL /* Bust measurement in inches */,
  "waist_cm" REAL /* Waist measurement in centimeters */,
  "waist_inches" REAL /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "hip_cm" REAL /* Hip measurement in centimeters */,
  "hip_inches" REAL /* Hip measurement in inches */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of clothing for the size chart */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of clothing for the size chart */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the size chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., Tops, Bottoms, Dresses) */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the product */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart applicable to the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "profile_size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer's saved size chart */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_profile_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("profile_size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer whose measurements are recorded */,
  "bust_cm" REAL /* Bust measurement in centimeters */,
  "waist_cm" REAL /* Waist measurement in centimeters */,
  "hip_cm" REAL /* Hip measurement in centimeters */,
  "weight_kg" REAL /* Weight in kilograms */,
  "height_cm" REAL /* Height in centimeters */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurements were taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_measurements_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer for whom the recommendation is made */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product for which the size is recommended */,
  "recommended_size" TEXT /* Recommended size for the customer based on their measurements */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend entry */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Size label that is being tracked (e.g., XS, S) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of clothing for the trend */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of clothing for the trend */,
  "trend_count" INTEGER /* Count of how many times the size was selected */,
  "recorded_date" TEXT /* Date when the trend was recorded */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group for the trend */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_trends_size_label FOREIGN KEY ("size_label") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_label")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was made */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order to which the item belongs */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the product ordered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES customer_orders ("order_id")
)
